title: DuPont's $5 bln acquisition of Rogers isn't going to close on time amid regulatory talks with China
text: DuPont de Nemours Inc. DD, -1.17% and Rogers Corp. ROG, -0.10% said their pending merger will not close as expected by the end of the third quarter of 2022 pending ongoing talks with Chinese regulators.

title: DuPont and Rogers Provide Update on Pending Merger
DuPont to Host Virtual Line of Business Teach-in: Safety Solutions
text: WILMINGTON, Del. , Sept. 13, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Leland Weaver, President of DuPont's Water & Protection segment, will host a virtual teach-in presentation related to the Safety Solutions line of business on Wednesday, September 21 st from 10:00 a.m.

title: CoStar Group, Invitation Homes Set to Join S&P 500; Others to Join S&P 100, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600
text: NEW YORK , Sept. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- S&P Dow Jones Indices ("S&P DJI") will make the following changes to the S&P 100, S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600 indices effective prior to the open of trading on Monday, September 19 to coincide with the quarterly rebalance: Advanced Micro Devices Inc. (NASD:AMD) will replace DuPont de Nemours Inc. (NYSE:DD) in the S&P 100.

title: DuPont de Nemours (DD) Down 4.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
text: DuPont de Nemours (DD) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
